questions.questionText: Two particles of masses 1 kg and 3 kg are placed at coordinates (0, 0) and (4 m, 0) respectively. The center of mass of the system is at:
The ratio of the moment of inertia of a thin circular ring and a uniform circular disc of same mass M and same radius R about their respective central axes is:
A wheel of moment of inertia 2 kg·m² is subjected to a constant torque of 10 N·m. The angular acceleration produced in the wheel is:
A ballerina pulls her arms closer to her body while spinning. Her angular speed increases because:
options: Moment of inertia decreases, conserving angular momentum

questions.questionText: A solid cylinder and a solid sphere of the same mass and radius release from rest down the same inclined plane. Both roll without slipping. The ratio of their accelerations (a_cylinder / a_sphere) is:
conceptualTags: Moment of Inertia of Sphere & Cylinder
